new_text: FLEX (arXiv:2511.06449): Gradient-free evolution via hierarchical experience library. 3 stages: exploration → library evolution → guided reasoning. Shows +23% AIME25, +10% USPTO50k, +14% ProteinGym. Torus applicability: LanceDB is experience library; gates are Actor-Critic; hierarchical retrieval maps. Implementable: add zone field (golden/warning) to knowledge table, bias search toward golden zone.

Session 397: 11-way framework comparison (Torus mem2x 78, Voice Branch 69, Torus Public 67). Key findings: Torus Learning raised 62→82 (8 learning mechanisms); Testing raised 70→88 (28,857 test lines); Observability raised 65→92 (11 modules). Hive Learning lowered 70→55 (no cross-session persistence); Memory lowered 55→35 (no semantic retrieval). Voice Branch corrected 79→69 (missing mem2x upgrades).

Audit v2 (2026-02-09): 0 CRITICAL, 6 HIGH, 12 MEDIUM, 17 LOW, 15 INFO. High findings: race condition load_state/save_state, write-then-execute bypass, interpreter one-liner bypass, Gates 5/8 exempt hooks/, symlink bypass, memory server unvalidated params. Medium: unbounded verified_fixes/pending_verification, sideband file manipulation, Gate pattern gaps (C/CPP/RB/PHP/SH, helm/terraform). Top 5 fixes: remove hooks/ exempt, cap verified_fixes, fix requirements.txt, add memory input validation, expand patterns.

Crash-proof decorator in memory_server.py: (1) Added functools import, (2) @crash_proof decorator wraps fns, logs traceback, returns error dict, (3) Applied to all 15 @mcp.tool handlers, (4) Wrapped _init_chromadb() with degraded flag, (5) Last-resort exception handler in mcp.run(). Fixed test_framework.py. Tests: 1036 passed, 1 pre-existing failure.

Hybrid memory linking decision: (1) Use resolves:MEMORY_ID in tags (zero schema cost), (2) Server hint when type:fix without resolves:, (3) Validate resolves:ID, (4) Search co-retrieval fetches linked memories, (5) Bidirectional: remember_this updates target. ~40-50 lines. Zero static cost, +125 dynamic. Chosen over New Parameter (+6,500 tokens) and Tag Convention alone.

Hybrid Memory Linking Implemented (Session 91): (1) Phase 1: Tag parsing + bidirectional in remember_this, validates target, creates resolved_by backlink. (2) Phase 2: Response fields (linked_to, link_warning, hint). (3) Phase 3: Search co-retrieval in search_knowledge, batch-fetches linked IDs, appends with linked=True. (4) Phase 4: 9 test cases. All 1043 tests pass.

MCP UDS socket resilience (Session 211): (1) Added _uds_shutting_down flag, (2) Extracted _bind_uds_socket() helper, (3) Rewrote _start_socket_server() with proactive watchdog (1s check, rebind if missing), (4) Updated _cleanup_socket(). Also fixed boot indexer status: added _write_idx_status(done) before early return to prevent stuck indexing state. All 1448 tests pass.

Added health_check() MCP tool (Session evolution-swarm-268): Returns status, uptime, table_counts, total_memories, last_write, embedding_model state, lancedb state, tags_db status, disk_usage_mb, initialized flag. Lightweight: uses cached col.count(), filesystem stats, falls back to -1 if unavailable. Uses existing globals. Reads MEMORY_TIMESTAMP_FILE for last_write. No new test failures.

Progressive Disclosure for Memory Server (Session 16): 85.5% token savings. Changes: (1) memory_server.py: added SUMMARY_LENGTH=120, format_summaries() for nested/flat results, added get_memory(id) for O(1) retrieval, updated 3 tools. (2) test_framework.py: 2 new tests. (3) CLAUDE.md: retrieval pattern note. Response: 33,036→4,799 chars. Summary: {id, preview 120 chars, relevance, tags, timestamp}. Tests: 240/240 pass.

Upgrade A+B in memory_server.py (Session 199): UPGRADE A: Anchored 15 NOISE_PATTERNS with ^ prefix and   boundaries to fix false positives. Added 5 new patterns (empty acks, session boilerplate, tool echo, traceback headers, filler). Total: 20. UPGRADE B: Tag Normalization via _normalize_tags() mapping 15 bare tags to dimensioned format (e.g., fix→type:fix). Non-destructive. Tests: 1410/1413, 16 direct verification pass.

Ingestion Levers (Session 124, 1081 tests, 0 failures): Lever 1: CLAUDE.md save rule expanded (failed-approach/user-preference). Lever 4: Auto-Remember Hooks via _auto_remember_event() (4 triggers: test pass, git commit, error fix verified, heavy edits). Rate limit 10/session. Lever 2: Observation Promotion via 3 scoped criteria (standalone errors, cross-session file churn 5+, repeated patterns 3+). Files: CLAUDE.md, memory_server.py, tracker.py, boot.py.

gate_correlator.py (shared module): (1) build_cooccurrence_matrix(entries) — symmetric (gate_a, gate_b)->count. (2) detect_gate_chains(entries, window=5s) — directed A→B patterns. (3) detect_redundant_gates(entries, jaccard_threshold=0.85) — similarity + agreement. (4) optimize_gate_order(entries) — block_rate*0.6 + latency*0.4; Tier 1 pinned first. Read-only, lazy-loading facade. Tested with 5000 entries: 63 pairs, 182 chains, correct ordering.

ActMem (arxiv 2603.00026): Memory Knowledge Graph from dialogue history. 4 modules: (1) Fact Extraction → atomic sentences, (2) Clustering (cosine τ=0.2), (3) KG construction (similarity 0.3, causal PMI 0.8), (4) Counterfactual-based retrieval. DeepSeek-V3: 71.66% retrieval/76.52% QA. GPT-4o-mini: 76.92%/52.22%. +14.78% over LightMem. Outperforms NaiveRAG by revealing retrieval-reasoning gap. Ablation: removing counterfactual→9% drop. No episodic/semantic split.

MCP Memory Server: memory_server.py, FastMCP + ChromaDB persistent. Storage: ~/data/memory/chroma.sqlite3 (~168KB). Collection: knowledge (cosine). Dedup: SHA256(content)[:16]. 5 tools: search_knowledge, remember_this, deep_query, get_recent_activity, memory_stats. Config: ~/.claude/mcp.json, enabled in settings.local.json. Sideband: .memory_last_queried (Gate 4 detection). Session 1 fix: corrected stale path.

Toroidal Teams v1 (all 3 phases on Toroidal-teams branch). Phase 1 (a8ff94d): Foundation—~/agents/{role}/, ~/.claude/channels/, watcher.sh, launch/teardown. Phase 2 (9cfe857): Automation—.agent-config.json, idle_prompt_hook 3-state, CLAUDE.md outbox. Phase 3 (de77791+41ac46f): Safety—Gate 13 co-claims, SessionStart hook, manage.sh. Key: identity separate from workspace, tmux pipes, real session IDs, co-claim watcher registration, inotify tuning.
